name: integration_how_many_new_creatives_should_i_test_a_m
method: How many new creatives should I test a month

phases.name: generate_variants
steps: generate 5 hook variations per piece via claude -p

phases.name: score_existing
steps: pull engagement data from posted content
classify winners (>3%) vs losers (<1%) vs mid
extract winning patterns (hook type, length, CTA style)

phases.name: optimize
steps: feed winning patterns into next generation prompt
